subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim to the sanctuary of the Most Exalted One! Blessed art thou to have attained the sacred and blessed Shrine. How blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مطاف ملا اعلی خوشا بحال تو که بزیارت روضه مبارکه فائز شدی خوشا بحال
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
